title: Sales Revenue Calculation
description: Using the provided product sales spreadsheet, calculate the total revenue for each row by multiplying Quantity by Unit_Price. Add a new column 'Revenue' with the computed values.
instructions: Open the sales_data.ods spreadsheet in the workspace.
The spreadsheet contains columns: Product, Category, Quantity, Unit_Price.
Add a new column E called 'Revenue' that equals Quantity * Unit_Price for every data row.
Round each Revenue value to 2 decimal places.
Save the result as sales_data.ods (overwrite in place).
